Compliance.description: Registered PTY; CPA compliant consumer rights; NCC/FSCA not applicable; no major violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed: HelloPeter 2.53/5 (46 reviews), Trustpilot 2.5/5 (250+ reviews); app 4.5/5; positive orders/negative on deliveries.

Product Value.description: Competitive book/media range with extensive 15M+ products; some deals but Takealot often cheaper; good value for niche products.

Innovation.description: App with reviews/recommendations; rewards club; personalized deals via email; limited new tech vs competitors.

Customer Support.description: Phone/email/chat channels; quick response promised; low review resolution rates; complex delivery issues.

Accessibility & Security.description: Online shopping with app; assumed POPIA compliance; secure payments; no major data breaches. Limited advanced security info.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Books from R100; electronics R500-R5000; delivery R89-R200

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed HelloPeter/Trustpilot on delivery/service; app positive; niche praise for media selection.
